title: AXA Mansard Insurance Board To Meet January 16th, 2023
description: Pursuant to the post-listing requirements of the Nigerian Exchange Limited (NGX) for Issuers, AXA Mansard Insurance Plc has informed NGX, esteemed shareholders and stakeholders that the board of direc
html:
Pursuant to the post-listing requirements of the Nigerian Exchange Limited (NGX) for Issuers, AXA Mansard Insurance Plc has informed NGX, esteemed shareholders and stakeholders that the board of directors of the company is scheduled to meet on Thursday, 16th of February 2023 to consider the Audited Financial Statements for the year ending December 31, 2022.

According to the company “Kindly note that we are required to forward the Audited Financial Statements to the National Insurance Commission (NAICOM) for approval, prior to the release of the results on the floor of NGX. We shall notify you of the decisions reached after the meeting”.
